title: xanthophyllum schizocarpon
intro: Xanthophyllum schizocarpon is a plant species within the Xanthophyllum genus of the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the milkwort family. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Xanthophyllum schizocarpon include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used in the treatment of various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
